name: kitchen managers at restaurants processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For kitchen managers at restaurants processing 10–20 invoices/month, invoice discrepancies cause financial losses. We monitor supplier invoices instead of manual invoice checking.

problem_solved: Discrepancies in supplier invoices leading to financial losses.
